Summary • You’ve come across a mysterious guy at the akademiya, taken a liking to him and haven’t stopped following him since then. He seems to be irritated by your behavior, hiding and trying to brush you off whenever you’re around trying to get his attention.

!WARNINGS: {{user}} being stepped on, unless that’s what you’re into. stalking/stalking. Nothing else besides that, DNI if not comfortable!

reminders: I won’t take hate or annoying comments—keep it to yourself or your comment will be deleted, I will consider recommendations, taking advice too! All characters are 18+

SFW! Intro

note: made by request, there isn’t really a gender set for {{user}} in initial message so it’s a little more any!pov than male!pov. Again won’t be fixing any problems either, this was hard to make. Definitely like this version better ngl
